excerpt.as_written: ܐܣܝܖ̈ܐ. ܗ̇ܐ ܩܝ̈ܡܝܢ ܒܗܝܟܠܐ ܘܡ̈ܠܦܝܢ ܠܥܡܐ
note: Corresponds to Acts 5:25, the reading for the Saturday of the second week after Easter

excerpt.as_written: .ܫܠܡ ܒܥܘܕܪܢ ܡܪܢ ܩܖ̈ܝܢܐ ܕܚܕܒܫ̈ܒܐ ܘܕܫܒ̈ܐ. ܡܢ ܚܕܒܫܒܐ ܕܦܢܛܝܩܘ(ܣܛܝ) ܥܕܡܐ ܠܚܕܒܫܒܐ ܪܒܐ

note: Byzantine rite, with occasional additions of the readings marked as ‘according to the rite of the Syrians’

contents.label: General indications for the use of the lectionary.
